mapper.sql: uc.id, uc.user_id, uc.coupon_id, uc.status, uc.order_id, uc.used_time, uc.received_time, uc.created_at, uc.updated_at, uc.deleted_at

c.name AS coupon_name, c.type AS coupon_type, c.amount AS coupon_amount, c.discount AS coupon_discount, c.min_amount AS coupon_min_amount, c.valid_start_time AS coupon_valid_start_time, c.valid_end_time AS coupon_valid_end_time, c.description AS coupon_description
mapper.update: UPDATE user_coupons uc INNER JOIN coupons c ON uc.coupon_id = c.id SET uc.status = 2 WHERE uc.deleted_at IS NULL AND uc.status = 0 AND c.valid_end_time < #{now}
mapper.select:
SELECT ,
FROM user_coupons uc LEFT JOIN coupons c ON uc.coupon_id = c.id WHERE uc.deleted_at IS NULL AND uc.order_id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1
